packageRules.description: Group CAIL primitive minor/patch bumps into one auto-tested PR.
A breaking major of a CAIL primitive (e.g. cail-identity 4.x) gets its own reviewable PR — never grouped.

hostRules.description: @cuny-ai-lab/* resolve from the private GitHub Packages npm registry. The hosted Renovate app needs a read:packages token supplied via encrypted hostRules (https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/) before it can resolve these packages; until the app is installed on the CUNY-AI-Lab org this config is inert.
